title: Chewy Medivial Mediterranean Pomegranate Stir-fry
description: A rich, chewy, romantic Polish dish featuring Szechuan peppercorns and pomegranates in a mediterranean-friendly twist, perfect for adding a delightful twist to your dinner table.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add ground beef to the skillet and cook until browned, breaking it into small pieces as it cooks. Season with salt and pepper.
Add onion and garlic to the skillet; sauté for about 5 minutes or until softened.
Stir in diced tomatoes along with their juice, ginger, Szechuan peppercorns, and a splash of water (about 1/4 cup). Let it simmer for about 10 minutes.
Increase heat to high and add pomegranate arils. Stir well to combine and cook for an additional 5-7 minutes or until the sauce thickens slightly and all ingredients are heated through.
Serve hot as a main dish, garnished with extra pomegranate arils if desired.
